author: han0110
content: Opened a PR https://github.com/ethpandaops/ethereum-package/pull/1368 to update zkboost to `v0.6.0` , now it supports the auto resolution for Ere `image` and `elf_url` (renamed from `program_url`), it's resolved by reading the `Cargo.toml` of zkboost repo. Also add the default zisk `shm_size` and `ulimits`, the gpu configuration now only require the device count or ids (like shown above).
